icebreakers.text: Who's most likely to become a millionaire before turning 40?
Who's most likely to survive a zombie apocalypse?
Who's most likely to talk their way out of a parking ticket?
Who's most likely to become famous for all the wrong reasons?
Who's most likely to still be single in ten years?
Who's most likely to accidentally start an international incident?
Who's most likely to become a cult leader?
Who's most likely to win an argument with zero actual evidence?
Who's most likely to cry during a cheesy movie and deny it afterwards?
Who's most likely to fake their own death just to skip a boring meeting?
Who's most likely to end up running for president one day?
Who's most likely to get insanely rich and never tell anyone?
What's one flaw of {name} that everyone secretly notices?
What's the most annoying habit {name} has?
What job do you picture {name} doing in ten years?
If {name} became famous overnight, what would it be for?
What's {name}'s biggest hidden talent?
What secret do you think {name} is hiding from everyone here?
If {name} ruled the world for a day, what's the first law they'd pass?
How do you picture {name} dying, in the most dramatic way possible?
What's {name}'s spirit animal, and why does it explain everything about them?
What's the weirdest thing {name} has probably done alone at home?
What would {name}'s autobiography be titled?
What job would {name} be terrible at, no matter how hard they tried?
